summary: Live Firebase Admin and Lenskart POS credentials shipped in package
details: The package tarball includes a complete Google Firebase Admin SDK service-account JSON file (fir-51e77-firebase-adminsdk-x3sdp-fd902b74ae.json) for the `tango-trax` Firebase project, containing the RSA private key and client_email `firebase-adminsdk-k7lom@tango-trax.iam.gserviceaccount.com`. Any party who installs this package obtains full Firebase Admin authority over that project (read/write all data, mint custom auth tokens, impersonate any user). Additionally, src/controllers/internalTrax.controller.js hardcodes live Lenskart POS API credentials (username `tango.eye`, password `55eyetango123`, header `X-Lenskart-API-Key: valyoo123`) inside the exported `aomupdateCollection` / `saleUpdateCollection` route handlers, which POST to webservice.pos.lenskart.com and central.pos.lenskart.com. A third hardcoded default password (`5dqFKAJj29PsV6P+kL+3Dw==`) is assigned to auto-provisioned users during PCLconfigCreation, allowing anyone to log in as any auto-provisioned account. These are credentials for third-party systems (Google Cloud / Firebase, Lenskart POS) that any installer can extract and abuse against those systems.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
